Ntc Of Motion For Order For Disposition Of Unclaimed Client Files
Off Calendar Feb-24-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances - Atty. maria J. Oropeza of The State Bar of California, (415-538-2569) appearing for plaintiff.
No appearance for defendant.
Ruling - PLAINTIFF THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA's Motion For Order For Disposition Of Unclaimed Client Files is granted as unopposed. Moving party to submit order. Party stipulated to have matter decided by Judge Pro Tem. Nils Rosenquest Judge Pro Tem, not reported. =(302/JPT)
